/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/add.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/commit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/branch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/checkout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/diff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/tag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/remote.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/push.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/pull.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/clone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/config_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs.dir/cli/commands/cat_object.cpp.o -o nvcs  libnvcs_core.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
